stem: A rectangle has a length of 5 units and a width of 24 units. Which expression gives the area, in square units, of this rectangle?
rationale: Choice B is correct. The area of a rectangle is length times width. With length 5 and width 24, the area is 5 · 24 square units. Choice A is the sum. Choice C is the perimeter. Choice D incorrectly squares the width.
